## Task
A clear description of what needs to be done.

## Why This Matters
How does this help the project?

## Getting Started
1. Fork the repo
2. Check out [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
3. Ask questions in the issue comments — we're here to help!

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Code follows the project style
- [ ] Tests pass (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed

## Estimated Effort
- [ ] < 1 hour
- [ ] 1-3 hours
- [ ] Half day
- [ ] Full day
